---
title: "Home"
---

::: hero
# Hi, I'm Ayush Kumar 👋

I'm an **Associate AI Engineer** at **Griphic**, where I work on end-to-end development for CAD retrieval applications and Intelligent Digital Twin builders for predictive analytics.

I hold an **M.Tech. in Data Science** from the Defence Institute of Advanced Technology, Pune (CGPA 9.0), and a **B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering** from Echelon Institute of Technology (CGPA 9.021, First Division with Honours).

My work spans **machine learning**, **deep learning**, **computer vision**, **NLP**, and **generative AI**. I'm passionate about building **scalable, ethical, and impactful AI systems** that solve real-world problems.

![Profile Picture](images/photo.png){.profile-image}

### Connect with Me

[📧 Email](mailto:akcoolkmr@gmail.com) · [🔗 LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ayush-kumar-4234b8155/) · [💻 GitHub](https://github.com/Harper2123) · [📄 Resume](resume/Entire_Resume.pdf)

:::

## What I Do

::: project-grid

::: project-card
### Machine Learning & AI

Building intelligent systems that learn from data, from traditional ML models to cutting-edge deep learning architectures.
:::

::: project-card
### Computer Vision

Developing models for image classification, object detection, and image generation using CNNs, GANs, and diffusion models.
:::

::: project-card
### NLP & Text Analytics

Creating pipelines for sentiment analysis, text processing, and building applications powered by large language models.
:::

::: project-card
### Data Engineering

Designing robust data pipelines, working with databases (SQL & NoSQL), and transforming raw data into actionable insights.
:::

:::
